subject: An anthropomorphic elephant-folk detective (loxodon) crouching low to the ground, pressing an oversized ear against the floor or wall to listen in, draped in a long heavy coat
description: A loxodon — a bipedal humanoid elephant — is shown in profile crouched low, its enormous floppy ear pressed flat to a surface in the act of eavesdropping. The figure wears a long, layered greatcoat with belts and pouches suggesting a detective's kit. The palette is dominated by warm tans and beiges of the elephant's hide against muddy greens and browns of the setting, with a soft hazy background suggesting an alleyway or dim interior in the gothic-urban Ravnica setting. The composition is mid-shot and quiet, emphasizing patient observation rather than action.
foreground: crouching loxodon detective with ear pressed to a surface, wearing a long coat
background: hazy muted environment, possibly an alley or interior wall, painterly and indistinct
